---
title: "extend-dictionary-lag-covariates"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Clear environment

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
```

# Libraries

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
```

# Parameters

```{r}
wd <- "/Volumes/DEBIAS"

in_path <- file.path(wd, "data/inputs/census/census2021-ts/dictionary.csv")
out_path <- file.path(wd, "data/inputs/census/census2021-ts/dictionary_with_lags.csv")

# Suffix used in modelling script for lagged covariates
lag_suffix <- "_lagq"
```

# Load dictionary

```{r}
dict <- read_csv(in_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
glimpse(dict)
```

# Detect key columns

```{r}
col_var0 <- if ("var_label0" %in% names(dict)) "var_label0" else NA_character_
col_var2 <- if ("var_label2" %in% names(dict)) "var_label2" else NA_character_
col_var5 <- if ("var_label5" %in% names(dict)) "var_label5" else NA_character_
col_group <- if ("group" %in% names(dict)) "group" else NA_character_

if (is.na(col_var0) || is.na(col_var5)) {
  stop("Dictionary must contain at least var_label0 and var_label5.")
}

cat("Detected columns:\n")
cat("  var_label0:", col_var0, "\n")
cat("  var_label2:", col_var2, "\n")
cat("  var_label5:", col_var5, "\n")
cat("  group:", col_group, "\n")
```

# Build lagged entries

```{r}
# Exclude non-covariates commonly present in dictionary
excluded_names <- c("bias", "bias_w", "date", "geography", "geography.code", "code", "name")

base_rows <- dict %>%
  filter(!.data[[col_var0]] %in% excluded_names)

lag_rows <- base_rows %>%
  mutate(
    "{col_var0}" := paste0(.data[[col_var0]], lag_suffix),
    "{col_var5}" := paste0(.data[[col_var5]], lag_suffix)
  )

if (!is.na(col_var2)) {
  lag_rows <- lag_rows %>%
    mutate("{col_var2}" := paste0("Spatial lag: ", .data[[col_var2]]))
}

if (!is.na(col_group)) {
  lag_rows <- lag_rows %>%
    mutate("{col_group}" := if_else(is.na(.data[[col_group]]), "spatial_lag", paste0(.data[[col_group]], "_lag")))
}

# Keep only lag rows not already present
lag_rows_new <- lag_rows %>%
  anti_join(dict %>% select(all_of(col_var0)), by = setNames(col_var0, col_var0))

dict_out <- bind_rows(dict, lag_rows_new)
```

# QA checks

```{r}
cat("Original rows: ", nrow(dict), "\n")
cat("New lag rows added: ", nrow(lag_rows_new), "\n")
cat("Final rows: ", nrow(dict_out), "\n")

# Quick preview of new rows
lag_rows_new %>%
  select(all_of(c(col_var0, col_var2, col_var5)[!is.na(c(col_var0, col_var2, col_var5))])) %>%
  head(10)
```

# Save output

```{r}
write_csv(dict_out, out_path)
cat("Saved extended dictionary to:\n", out_path, "\n")
```

# Optional: overwrite original dictionary

```{r}
# If needed, uncomment:
# write_csv(dict_out, in_path)
```
